[[General/Legends|General]] '''Vit''' was the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] officer commanding on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].

==Biography==
Originally working alongside [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] member [[Sigit Ranth]] on a mission to study the [[Infinity Gate]], General Vit remained in charge of the planet after his departure, charged with resettling the native [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomiri]] population in controlled camps, and also with leading [[Project Nightsaber]], an [[Imperial Remnant]] project aimed at creating a cadre of loyal [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]].

When rogue [[Jedi Praxeum]] student [[Dal Konur]] arrived on the planet, Vit saw him as a potential leader for the project, but he was thwarted by [[Kir Kanos]] and a group of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] heroes. Vit was captured, and Dathomir was temporarily liberated, although Imperial infiltration on the planet would continue. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], [[Brakiss]] infiltrated the [[Great Canyon Clan]] and remodeled them into a new [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] clan to serve as a recruiting ground for the [[Shadow Academy]], a project which can in many ways be seen as a continuation of Vit's earlier work.
